title: i-power UPS catalogue overview
text:
i-power UPS catalogue overview (brand: i-power, category: UPS Solutions).

This catalogue contains 181 UPS models across 34 product series. Product types available: online high-frequency UPS, online low-frequency UPS, rack-mountable UPS, modular UPS, inverters, and accessories (static transfer switches).

Models by type:
- Accessories: 9 models
- Inverters: 16 models
- Modular Series: 22 models
- On-line high frequency: 59 models
- On-line low frequency: 38 models
- Rack-Mountable: 37 models

Capacities range from 1 kVA single-phase units up to 1200 kVA three-phase systems. Phase options: single phase (1-in/1-out), three phase (3-in/3-out), and three-phase-in/single-phase-out. Form factors: tower, rack-mount, rack/tower convertible, wall-mount inverter, and modular power module. Battery options: built-in battery, long back-up (external battery), lithium-ion compatible, and combinations with parallel redundancy on select models.

title: i-power T-4001 series overview — T-4001 Single Phase (1-10KVA)
text:

Series: T-4001  |  Type: Online (high-frequency) UPS  |  Category: UPS Solutions
Capacity range: 1–10 kVA
Models in this configuration: 5
Available capacities: 1 kVA, 2 kVA, 3 kVA, 6 kVA, 10 kVA.

Overview: The i-power T-4001 series is a true online double-conversion UPS that can provide your critical equipment with reliable and stable sine wave power. It features significant advantages, including an output power factor up to 0.8/0.9 and up to 90% AC-AC efficiency for greater energy savings.

It is a versatile, high quality, and cost-competitive UPS developed to handle a wide voltage range and inconsistent power conditions. The T-4001 series provides a safe power supply guaranteed for mission-critical applications such as computer equipment, telecommunication devices, precision instrument, network termination equipment, and more.

Key features: Product Highlights: Wide Input Voltage Range allows the UPS to work in harsh environments and reduces battery discharging time. IGBT technology to achieve high overall efficiency up to 90%. High input power factor (0.99) and low harmonic distortion (THDI 5%) saves upstream investment. Can be connected with all kinds of generators to save customers costs. True online double-conversion topology and zero transfer time to battery provides 24/7 full-time protection. title: i-power T-4001 series overview — T-4001 Single Phase (6-10kVA)
text:
i-power T-4001 series overview — T-4001 Single Phase (6-10kVA)

Series: T-4001  |  Type: Online (high-frequency) UPS  |  Category: UPS Solutions
Capacity range: 6–10 kVA
Models in this configuration: 4
Available capacities: 6 kVA, 10 kVA.

Overview: The ipower T-4001 series is a robust online double-conversion UPS system engineered for critical power continuity in sensitive environments. With its true double-conversion architecture, it ensures uninterrupted pure sine-wave output, shielding connected equipment from voltage fluctuations, outages, and electrical disturbances. Operating at 94% efficiency in online mode and up to 98% in ECO mode, the system enhances energy savings without compromising reliability.

The ipower T-4001 series features a wide input voltage range (120–285VAC) and outstanding voltage accuracy (±1%). It supports a 0.9 output power factor and delivers clean output with less than 2% THD on linear loads. Certified for safety and performance, the system complies with CE, IEC/EN62040 standards, ensuring reliable operation across diverse industries.

Key features: True Double-Conversion Technology Ensures seamless power protection and high adaptability to harsh mains conditions. - Output Power Factor Delivers a 0.9 output power factor for improved load capacity. - High Efficiency Operation Achieves up to 94% efficiency in online mode and 98% in ECO mode, supporting energy savings. - Wide Input Range Supports input voltage range from 185–275VAC at 100% load and 120–185VAC with linear derating to 50% load. - LCD Display Offers real-time operational data and alerts via an easy-to-read LCD interface. - Intelligent Communication Slot (Optional) Supports SNMP and remote monitoring integration. - Parallel Operation (Optional) Up to 3 units can operate in parallel with optional parallel card. Model OH1006T91507S OH1006T91600S OH1010T91607S OH1010T91600S Capacity 6kVA/5.4kW 6kVA/5.4kW 10kVA/9kW 10kVA/9kW

Overview: The ipower T-4001 series is a high-performance online doubleconversion UPS designed to deliver pure sine-wave power for mission-critical applications. With its true online technology, it provides seamless power protection against grid fluctuations, outages, and electrical noise. The system boasts an impressive output power factor of 1.0 and up to 99.5% efficiency in ECO mode, ensuring optimal energy savings while maintaining reliable operation.

T-4001 series features a wide input voltage range (110- 280VAC) and exceptional voltage regulation (±1%). Its full-bridge inverter design accommodates challenging loads, including half-wave and unbalanced configurations, while maintaining less than 3% THD for clean power output.

Key features: True Double-Conversion Technology Provides complete isolation from grid irregularities, ensuring clean and stable power output. - Pure Sine-Wave Output Protects sensitive electronics with distortion-free AC power (<3% THD for linear loads). - 60A High-Speed Charger Rapidly recharges external 48V battery banks (batteries sold separately). - Cold Start Function Powers critical loads directly from batteries without AC input. - Parallel Expansion Supports up to 9 units for single/three-phase setups with a shared battery system. - Generator-Compatible Works seamlessly with generator power sources. - Full-Bridge Inverter Design Handles half-wave & unbalanced loads without performance loss. - Zero Transfer Time Instant switch to battery power with no interruption. - LCD Display Real-time monitoring of load, battery status, and fault alerts. - Robust Protection Overload, short-circuit, and overcharge safeguards. Overview: The i-power Static Transfer Switch (STS) series, operating at 380VAC and featuring a 3-phase / 4-pole switch mode, transfers the critical load between independent power sources. Designed with fully digital control , the STS boasts a high reliability and a fast operation speed.

In the event of an interruption or abnormal conditions in one source feeder, the critical load will be transferred to the second power source without interruption of power to the connected load. This high-speed load transfer guarantees the uniterrupted operation for even the most senstive electronic equipment and also supported by protection functions like input overvoltage and undervoltage protection

Its advanced pure sine wave MPPT inverter and wide PV input voltage range maximize energy efficiency, while the integrated 120A MPPT solar charger optimizes solar energy utilization for peak performance Designed to excel in challenging environments, the inverter features an anti-dust kit for enhanced durability and compatibility with lithium-ion batteries. About this product: The i-power T-7703 Series is an advanced three-phase low-voltage hybrid inverter engineered for residential and small commercial applications, supporting power systems from 10kW to 20kW. It offers an impressive 500A charge/discharge current and supports three battery inputs for flexible energy storage configurations. Built with cutting-edge SiC technology and a durable full aluminum IP66-rated enclosure, the T-7703 Series ensures exceptional efficiency, reliability, and long-term performance. It accommodates a wide input voltage range (154–286V per phase), features automatic 50/60Hz frequency adaptation, robust surge protection, and provides up to 150% unbalanced three-phase output for stable and efficient power delivery.

Typical applications: Residential, Commercial, Industry, Remote locations, Agriculture, Medical & Emergency, Public Infrastructure

i-power T-6003 — 240 kVA Modular UPS (Three phase, Modular power module)

Model code: MH3240U94000S
Product series / family: T-6003 (Modular Series)
Rated capacity: 240 kVA / 240 kW
Output power factor: 1
Topology / type: Modular UPS
Phase configuration: Three phase (3-in / 3-out)
Form factor: Modular power module
Battery configuration: Long back-up (external battery)
Parallel / redundancy capable: No

About this product: The i-power T-6003 series is a true online double-conversion modular UPS that can provide your critical equipment with reliable and stable power. It features significant advantages, including hot-swappable modular structure and N+X redundancy. With its high efficiency, this series delivers remarkably low total cost of ownership and operating expense. The i-power T-6003 is the ultimate modular UPS series for Data centres and other critical loads. The UPS is designed to protect any critical high-density computer and IT environment, while achieving maximum availability. The T-6003 series grows along with the demands of the business without over-sizing the UPS, optimizing both the initial investment and the total cost of ownership.

Typical applications: Data Centers, Networks, Security, Storage, Finance Light Industrial Applications

Other capacities available in the T-6003 series: 60 kVA, 80 kVA, 100 kVA, 120 kVA, 160 kVA, 180 kVA, 200 kVA, 240 kVA, 300 kVA, 400 kVA.
Documentation available: Data Sheet, CE/RoHS certificates.

The ipower T-4001 series features a wide input voltage range (120–285VAC) and outstanding voltage accuracy (±1%). Model code: OH1006T91600S
Product series / family: T-4001 (On-line high frequency)
Rated capacity: 6 kVA / 5.4 kW
Output power factor: 0.9
Topology / type: Online (high-frequency) UPS
Phase configuration: Single phase (1-in / 1-out)
Form factor: Tower
Battery configuration: Built-in battery + Long back-up (external battery)
Parallel / redundancy capable: Yes

About this product: The ipower T-4001 series is a robust online double-conversion UPS system engineered for critical power continuity in sensitive environments. With its true double-conversion architecture, it ensures uninterrupted pure sine-wave output, shielding connected equipment from voltage fluctuations, outages, and electrical disturbances. Operating at 94% efficiency in online mode and up to 98% in ECO mode, the system enhances energy savings without compromising reliability. The ipower T-4001 series features a wide input voltage range (120–285VAC) and outstanding voltage accuracy (±1%). It supports a 0.9 output power factor and delivers clean output with less than 2% THD on linear loads. Certified for safety and performance, the system complies with CE, IEC/EN62040 standards, ensuring reliable operation across diverse industries.

Typical applications: Network, Banking, Servers, PC, Security, Education, E-commerce, Labs, Emergency Devices, Control circuits

Other capacities available in the T-4001 series: 6 kVA, 10 kVA.
Documentation available: Data Sheet, CE/RoHS certificates.
